nodes.name: Grey-collared oriole
nodes.summary: The grey-collared oriole (Oriolus forsteni), or Seram oriole, is a species of bird in the family Oriolidae. It is endemic to Seram. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. References
nodes.shortSummary: The grey-collared oriole (Oriolus forsteni), or Seram oriole, is a species of bird in the family Oriolidae. It is endemic to Seram.

nodes.name: Oriolus
nodes.summary: Oriolus（Oriolus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联31种鸟类，如Dusky-brown oriole、Black-eared oriole、Grey-collared oriole等31种鸟类。

nodes.name: Grey-collared oriole
nodes.summary: Grey-collared oriole（Oriolus forsteni）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Grey-collared oriole。
